name: compile_document
description: Check the compilation status of knowledge base documents. When given a specific document_id, returns its compilation status (summary, entities, tags). When compile_all is true, returns a list of uncompiled documents that need processing. Use this to understand what has been compiled and what still needs attention.

document_id.description: Specific document ID to check compilation status for.

compile_all.description: When true, return a list of all uncompiled (pending) documents. Default false.

limit.description: Maximum number of pending documents to return when compile_all is true. Default 10.
